params_used.custom_text: // If in1 is high, out1 should be low; if in2 is high, out1 should be high; if in3 is high, out1 should remain unchanged; if in4 is high, out1 should be the logical OR of in5 and in6; if in7 is high, out1 should be the result of the logical AND between in8 and in9; if in10 is high, out1 should be set to the logical XOR of in8 and in9.
